requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances — No Horizontal RoHS in Azerbaijan vs China RoHS Disclosure
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质——阿塞拜疆无横向 RoHS vs 中国 RoHS 披露
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質——亞塞拜然無橫向 RoHS vs 中國 RoHS 披露

summary.en: Azerbaijan does not operate a horizontal RoHS-style restriction of hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment as a market-entry condition. It is not a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU), so the EAEU EAC marking and EAEU technical regulations (including any EAEU substance restrictions) do not apply either. As of this review there is no confirmed Azerbaijan equivalent to EU RoHS (Pb/Hg/Cd/Cr(VI)/PBB/PBDE + 4 phthalates) imposed as a precondition of placing LED luminaires on the market. General product-safety, chemical-safety, and consumer-protection rules may still apply to specific substances or hazards; manufacturers should verify whether any national chemical-safety or environmental rules restrict particular substances for lighting products. Do not assume the EU RoHS substance list is enforced — but equally do not assume zero chemical obligations.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆不实行以横向 RoHS 式限制电气电子设备有害物质作为市场准入条件的制度。其非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，故 EAEU EAC 标志及 EAEU 技术法规（含任何 EAEU 物质限制）亦不适用。截至本次评估，阿塞拜疆未确认存在相当于欧盟 RoHS（铅/汞/镉/六价铬/PBB/PBDE + 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯）、作为 LED 灯具上市先决条件强制执行的制度。一般产品安全、化学安全及消费者保护规则仍可能针对特定物质或危害适用；制造商应核实任何国家化学安全或环境规则是否对照明产品的特定物质加以限制。不要假定欧盟 RoHS 物质清单获执行——但同样不要假定零化学品义务。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜然不實行以橫向 RoHS 式限制電氣電子設備有害物質作為市場准入條件的制度。其非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，故 EAEU EAC 標誌及 EAEU 技術法規（含任何 EAEU 物質限制）亦不適用。截至本次評估，亞塞拜然未確認存在相當於歐盟 RoHS（鉛/汞/鎘/六價鉻/PBB/PBDE + 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯）、作為 LED 燈具上市先決條件強制執行的制度。一般產品安全、化學安全及消費者保護規則仍可能針對特定物質或危害適用；製造商應核實任何國家化學安全或環境規則是否對照明產品的特定物質加以限制。不要假定歐盟 RoHS 物質清單獲執行——但同樣不要假定零化學品義務。

standards_or_laws: Azerbaijan — no horizontal RoHS-equivalent substance restriction confirmed for EEE as a market-entry condition (national chemical-safety / product-safety rules may apply to specific substances)
Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member — EAEU EAC marking and EAEU technical regulations do not apply

summary.en: China's China RoHS 2 (Management Measures for the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products) with GB/T 26572 (concentration limits for restricted substances) covers the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) with the same thresholds as EU RoHS, and SJ/T 11364 requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange = contains above threshold / green = below) on EEE sold in China. China RoHS 2 is primarily a disclosure/marking regime rather than a market-access ban, and the 4 EU phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) are not in the CN mandatory restricted list.
summary.zh: 中国 RoHS 2（电子电气产品有害物质限制使用管理办法）配合 GB/T 26572（限用物质限量要求）涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同；SJ/T 11364 要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色 = 含量超限/绿色 = 低于限值）。中国 RoHS 2 主要为披露/标识制度而非市场准入禁令，欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）不在中国强制限制清单。
summary.zht: 中國 RoHS 2（電子電氣產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法）配合 GB/T 26572（限用物質限量要求）涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同；SJ/T 11364 要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色 = 含量超限/綠色 = 低於限值）。中國 RoHS 2 主要為披露/標識制度而非市場准入禁令，歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）不在中國強制限制清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: This is one of the few areas where the Azerbaijan target is lighter than the CN baseline rather than heavier: Azerbaijan has no confirmed horizontal RoHS substance-restriction barrier and is not an EAEU member, so neither EU RoHS nor EAEU substance rules gate market entry. Practical implications: (1) the China RoHS 2 disclosure label (SJ/T 11364) is a CN-domestic marking and does not transfer to Azerbaijan packaging — it should be removed or adapted; (2) there is no confirmed obligation to test for the EU 4 phthalates for the Azerbaijan market (unlike the EU lane); (3) however, do not assume zero chemical obligations — verify any national chemical-safety, environmental, or product-safety rules that could restrict specific substances, and any customer/buyer contractual RoHS requirements (private buyers often demand EU-RoHS conformity regardless of the legal regime). Confirm current Azerbaijan chemical/product-safety scope before relying on the absence of a substance restriction.
gap.zh: 这是阿塞拜疆目标较中国基线更轻而非更重的少数领域之一：阿塞拜疆无确认的横向 RoHS 物质限制壁垒，且非 EAEU 成员，故欧盟 RoHS 及 EAEU 物质规则均不构成市场准入门槛。实务影响：（1）中国 RoHS 2 披露标识（SJ/T 11364）为中国国内标识，不转用至阿塞拜疆包装——应移除或调整；（2）针对阿塞拜疆市场无确认的欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯检测义务（与欧盟通道不同）；（3）但不要假定零化学品义务——需核实任何可能限制特定物质的国家化学安全、环境或产品安全规则，以及任何客户/买方合同 RoHS 要求（私人买方常无论法律制度如何均要求符合欧盟 RoHS）。在依赖无物质限制之前，请确认阿塞拜疆现行化学/产品安全范围。
gap.zht: 這是亞塞拜然目標較中國基線更輕而非更重的少數領域之一：亞塞拜然無確認的橫向 RoHS 物質限制壁壘，且非 EAEU 成員，故歐盟 RoHS 及 EAEU 物質規則均不構成市場准入門檻。實務影響：（1）中國 RoHS 2 披露標識（SJ/T 11364）為中國國內標識，不轉用至亞塞拜然包裝——應移除或調整；（2）針對亞塞拜然市場無確認的歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測義務（與歐盟通道不同）；（3）但不要假定零化學品義務——需核實任何可能限制特定物質的國家化學安全、環境或產品安全規則，以及任何客戶/買方合同 RoHS 要求（私人買方常無論法律制度如何均要求符合歐盟 RoHS）。在依賴無物質限制之前，請確認亞塞拜然現行化學/產品安全範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Not confirmed as mandatory — no horizontal RoHS-equivalent substance restriction confirmed for Azerbaijan market entry; not an EAEU member (no EAC). National chemical/product-safety rules and buyer contracts may still apply — confirm
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not in CN mandatory list

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Azerbaijan has no confirmed horizontal RoHS-style substance restriction as a market-entry condition and is not an EAEU member, so neither EU RoHS nor EAEU substance rules gate entry — this area is lighter than for the EU. The China RoHS 2 disclosure label is CN-domestic and should be removed or adapted for Azerbaijan packaging. There is no confirmed Azerbaijan obligation to test the EU 4 phthalates, but do not assume zero chemical obligations — verify national chemical/product-safety rules and any buyer-contract RoHS requirements before relying on the absence of a restriction.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿塞拜疆无确认的、作为市场准入条件的横向 RoHS 式物质限制，且非 EAEU 成员，故欧盟 RoHS 及 EAEU 物质规则均不构成准入门槛——此领域较欧盟更轻。中国 RoHS 2 披露标识为中国国内标识，应为阿塞拜疆包装移除或调整。无确认的阿塞拜疆欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯检测义务，但不要假定零化学品义务——在依赖无物质限制前，请核实国家化学/产品安全规则及任何买方合同 RoHS 要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞塞拜然無確認的、作為市場准入條件的橫向 RoHS 式物質限制，且非 EAEU 成員，故歐盟 RoHS 及 EAEU 物質規則均不構成准入門檻——此領域較歐盟更輕。中國 RoHS 2 披露標識為中國國內標識，應為亞塞拜然包裝移除或調整。無確認的亞塞拜然歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測義務，但不要假定零化學品義務——在依賴無物質限制前，請核實國家化學/產品安全規則及任何買方合同 RoHS 要求。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical / Supply-Chain Disclosure — No REACH-Style SVHC Duty in Azerbaijan
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品 / 供应链披露——阿塞拜疆无 REACH 式 SVHC 义务
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品 / 供應鏈披露——亞塞拜然無 REACH 式 SVHC 義務

summary.en: Azerbaijan does not operate a REACH-style proactive supply-chain notification duty (no confirmed equivalent to EU REACH Article 33 SVHC communication, the ECHA Candidate List, or the SCIP database) as a precondition for LED luminaire market access. As a non-EAEU country, the EAEU chemical-regulation framework also does not apply. National chemical-management, environmental, and hazardous-chemical labelling rules may apply to chemicals as such, but there is no confirmed obligation to proactively communicate Substance-of-Very-High-Concern presence above 0.1% w/w in articles to business customers or consumers. Importers and buyers may nevertheless impose REACH-style contractual requirements; confirm both the national rules and any buyer requirements.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆不实行 REACH 式主动供应链通报义务（无确认相当于欧盟 REACH 第 33 条 SVHC 通报、ECHA 候选清单或 SCIP 数据库的制度），不作为 LED 灯具市场准入先决条件。作为非 EAEU 国家，EAEU 化学品法规框架亦不适用。国家化学品管理、环境及危险化学品标签规则可能针对化学品本身适用，但无确认的、就物品中 SVHC 浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）主动告知商业客户或消费者的义务。进口商及买方仍可能施加 REACH 式合同要求；请同时确认国家规则及任何买方要求。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜然不實行 REACH 式主動供應鏈通報義務（無確認相當於歐盟 REACH 第 33 條 SVHC 通報、ECHA 候選清單或 SCIP 數據庫的制度），不作為 LED 燈具市場准入先決條件。作為非 EAEU 國家，EAEU 化學品法規框架亦不適用。國家化學品管理、環境及危險化學品標籤規則可能針對化學品本身適用，但無確認的、就物品中 SVHC 濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）主動告知商業客戶或消費者的義務。進口商及買方仍可能施加 REACH 式合同要求；請同時確認國家規則及任何買方要求。

standards_or_laws: Azerbaijan — no confirmed REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification duty for articles (national chemical-management / hazardous-chemical rules may apply to chemicals as such)
Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member — EAEU chemical-regulation framework does not apply

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to REACH SVHC Article 33 supply-chain notification either. The closest CN instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances) on new-substance registration and GB 30981 (classification and labelling of chemicals) for hazardous-chemical labelling. None create an obligation to proactively notify B2B customers when an SVHC is present in an article above 0.1% w/w. So on this specific point, China and Azerbaijan are structurally similar — both lack a REACH-style article notification duty.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH SVHC 第 33 条供应链通报的制度。最接近的中国工具为生态环境部令第 12 号（新化学物质环境管理登记办法）关于新物质登记及 GB 30981（化学品分类和标签）用于危险化学品标签。上述均未产生在物品中 SVHC 浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）时主动通报 B2B 客户的义务。故就此具体点，中国与阿塞拜疆结构相似——均无 REACH 式物品通报义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH SVHC 第 33 條供應鏈通報的制度。最接近的中國工具為生態環境部令第 12 號（新化學物質環境管理登記辦法）關於新物質登記及 GB 30981（化學品分類和標籤）用於危險化學品標籤。上述均未產生在物品中 SVHC 濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）時主動通報 B2B 客戶的義務。故就此具體點，中國與亞塞拜然結構相似——均無 REACH 式物品通報義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Both Azerbaijan and China lack a REACH-style article SVHC notification duty, so there is no new mandatory cross-standard gap to clear here for the Azerbaijan market — unlike the EU lane, which adds an ongoing Article 33 / SCIP obligation. Practical implications: (1) no confirmed Azerbaijan obligation to screen the supply chain against an ECHA-style candidate list or to notify customers about SVHCs in articles; (2) however, EU-facing buyers or distributors re-exporting onward may still demand REACH conformity, and some private buyers require it contractually regardless of the destination's legal regime; (3) maintain basic chemical/material data on key components so any buyer or future regulatory request can be answered. Confirm current Azerbaijan national chemical-management rules and any buyer contractual requirements before treating this as a no-obligation area.
gap.zh: 阿塞拜疆与中国均无 REACH 式物品 SVHC 通报义务，故就阿塞拜疆市场此处无须新增强制跨标准差距——与增加持续第 33 条/SCIP 义务的欧盟通道不同。实务影响：（1）无确认的阿塞拜疆义务针对 ECHA 式候选清单筛查供应链或就物品中 SVHC 通报客户；（2）但面向欧盟或向下游再出口的买方/经销商仍可能要求符合 REACH，部分私人买方无论目的地法律制度如何均以合同要求；（3）就关键零部件保留基本化学/材料数据，以便回应任何买方或未来监管请求。在将此视为无义务领域前，请确认阿塞拜疆现行国家化学品管理规则及任何买方合同要求。
gap.zht: 亞塞拜然與中國均無 REACH 式物品 SVHC 通報義務，故就亞塞拜然市場此處無須新增強制跨標準差距——與增加持續第 33 條/SCIP 義務的歐盟通道不同。實務影響：（1）無確認的亞塞拜然義務針對 ECHA 式候選清單篩查供應鏈或就物品中 SVHC 通報客戶；（2）但面向歐盟或向下游再出口的買方/經銷商仍可能要求符合 REACH，部分私人買方無論目的地法律制度如何均以合同要求；（3）就關鍵零部件保留基本化學/材料數據，以便回應任何買方或未來監管請求。在將此視為無義務領域前，請確認亞塞拜然現行國家化學品管理規則及任何買方合同要求。

mandatory_status.target: Not confirmed as mandatory — no REACH-style SVHC article notification duty confirmed for Azerbaijan; not an EAEU member. National chemical rules and buyer contracts may still apply — confirm
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no supply-chain SVHC article notification obligation equivalent to REACH Article 33 exists in China

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Azerbaijan has no confirmed REACH-style SVHC article notification duty (no ECHA Candidate List / SCIP equivalent) and is not an EAEU member, and China likewise lacks an Article 33 equivalent — so this is not a new cross-standard barrier for the Azerbaijan market, unlike the EU lane. EU-facing buyers may still impose REACH conformity contractually. Keep basic chemical/material data on key components and confirm current national chemical-management rules and any buyer requirements before treating this as a no-obligation area.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿塞拜疆无确认的 REACH 式 SVHC 物品通报义务（无 ECHA 候选清单/SCIP 等同制度），且非 EAEU 成员，中国同样无第 33 条等同义务——故就阿塞拜疆市场此非新增跨标准壁垒，与欧盟通道不同。面向欧盟的买方仍可能以合同要求符合 REACH。请就关键零部件保留基本化学/材料数据，并在将此视为无义务领域前确认现行国家化学品管理规则及任何买方要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞塞拜然無確認的 REACH 式 SVHC 物品通報義務（無 ECHA 候選清單/SCIP 等同制度），且非 EAEU 成員，中國同樣無第 33 條等同義務——故就亞塞拜然市場此非新增跨標準壁壘，與歐盟通道不同。面向歐盟的買方仍可能以合同要求符合 REACH。請就關鍵零部件保留基本化學/材料數據，並在將此視為無義務領域前確認現行國家化學品管理規則及任何買方要求。

requirement_topic.en: Overall Conformity Process and Technical File — AZSTAND / Importer vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 整体合格评定流程与技术文件——AZSTAND / 进口商 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 整體合格評定流程與技術文件——AZSTAND / 進口商 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Placing LED luminaires on the Azerbaijan market generally requires: (1) compiling a technical file (design data, component specifications, and test reports for safety and EMC, plus photobiological and energy data where relevant); (2) obtaining AZSTAND conformity for regulated lighting products against the adopted AZS/IEC standards (IEC 60598-1, IEC 62560, IEC 61347-2-13, CISPR 15, IEC 61547, IEC 62471 as applicable); (3) channelling market access through an in-country importer who typically holds or supports the conformity documentation and customs clearance via the port of Baku; (4) applying any prescribed AZSTAND conformity mark and importer/consumer information on the product and packaging, commonly in Azerbaijani (often also Russian). Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member, so EAEU EAC marking is not used. IEC/CB-scheme test reports may help leverage existing Chinese test data into AZSTAND conformity — confirm acceptance with AZSTAND / the importer.
summary.zh: 在阿塞拜疆市场销售 LED 灯具一般要求：（1）编制技术文件（设计数据、零部件规格、安全及 EMC 检测报告，及相关时的光生物与能效数据）；（2）就受管制照明产品依据所采用 AZS/IEC 标准（视适用情况为 IEC 60598-1、IEC 62560、IEC 61347-2-13、CISPR 15、IEC 61547、IEC 62471）取得 AZSTAND 合格评定；（3）经由通常持有或支持合格评定文件并经巴库港办理清关的在地进口商完成市场准入；（4）在产品及包装上加注任何规定的 AZSTAND 合格标志及进口商/消费者信息，通常以阿塞拜疆语（常加俄语）。阿塞拜疆非 EAEU 成员，故不使用 EAEU EAC 标志。IEC/CB 方案检测报告可能有助于将现有中国检测数据转用于 AZSTAND 合格评定——请向 AZSTAND / 进口商确认接受度。
summary.zht: 在亞塞拜然市場銷售 LED 燈具一般要求：（1）編制技術文件（設計數據、零部件規格、安全及 EMC 檢測報告，及相關時的光生物與能效數據）；（2）就受管制照明產品依據所採用 AZS/IEC 標準（視適用情況為 IEC 60598-1、IEC 62560、IEC 61347-2-13、CISPR 15、IEC 61547、IEC 62471）取得 AZSTAND 合格評定；（3）經由通常持有或支持合格評定文件並經巴庫港辦理清關的在地進口商完成市場准入；（4）在產品及包裝上加注任何規定的 AZSTAND 合格標誌及進口商/消費者信息，通常以亞塞拜然語（常加俄語）。亞塞拜然非 EAEU 成員，故不使用 EAEU EAC 標誌。IEC/CB 方案檢測報告可能有助於將現有中國檢測數據轉用於 AZSTAND 合格評定——請向 AZSTAND / 進口商確認接受度。

standards_or_laws: AZSTAND national conformity regime — conformity assessment, marking, and technical-documentation requirements for regulated lighting products
Azerbaijan import / customs requirements — in-country importer and port of Baku (Caspian) clearance

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for in-scope luminaires is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and delivered by authorized bodies such as CQC (China Quality Certification Centre). CCC requires mandatory third-party certification; CQC voluntary certification is available for products outside mandatory CCC. For wireless-enabled luminaires (smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth), SRRC type approval is additionally required. CCC bodies and certificates are not automatically recognised for Azerbaijan AZSTAND conformity.
summary.zh: 在中国，范围内灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理并由 CQC（中国质量认证中心）等授权机构实施。CCC 要求强制性第三方认证；非强制 CCC 范畴产品可申请 CQC 自愿性认证。对于集成无线功能的灯具（具 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED），还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 机构及证书不被阿塞拜疆 AZSTAND 合格评定自动认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，範圍內燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理並由 CQC（中國質量認證中心）等授權機構實施。CCC 要求強制性第三方認證；非強制 CCC 範疇產品可申請 CQC 自願性認證。對於集成無線功能的燈具（具 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED），還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 機構及證書不被亞塞拜然 AZSTAND 合格評定自動認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: The AZSTAND conformity process and CCC run in parallel with no mutual recognition — a product needs separate conformity documentation for each market. Key Azerbaijan-specific points versus the CN baseline: (1) market access is typically channelled through an in-country importer (a different model from the EU Authorised Representative, but a similar in-country accountability function), and customs clears via the port of Baku; (2) the AZSTAND conformity mark (where prescribed) and Azerbaijani/Russian consumer information replace the CCC mark / Chinese packaging; (3) Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member, so no EAC marking is required (do not confuse Azerbaijan with EAEU markets); (4) IEC/CB-scheme test reports can often be leveraged into AZSTAND conformity, which may reduce re-testing versus re-running everything — but acceptance must be confirmed; (5) compared with the EU lane there is no RoHS phthalate testing, no EPREL registration, and no REACH SVHC duty confirmed, so the Azerbaijan documentation burden is generally lighter than the EU. Confirm the current AZSTAND conformity scope, accepted report formats, marking, and language with the in-country importer before shipment.
gap.zh: AZSTAND 合格评定流程与 CCC 并行运作，不存在互认——产品须为各市场分别准备合格评定文件。相对中国基线的阿塞拜疆特有要点：（1）市场准入通常经由在地进口商办理（不同于欧盟授权代表的模式，但具相似的在地问责职能），清关经巴库港；（2）AZSTAND 合格标志（如有规定）及阿塞拜疆语/俄语消费者信息替代 CCC 标志/中国包装；（3）阿塞拜疆非 EAEU 成员，故无须 EAC 标志（勿将阿塞拜疆与 EAEU 市场混淆）；（4）IEC/CB 方案检测报告常可转用于 AZSTAND 合格评定，相比全部重做可减少重新检测——但接受度须确认；（5）相比欧盟通道，无确认的 RoHS 邻苯二甲酸酯检测、无 EPREL 注册、无 REACH SVHC 义务，故阿塞拜疆文件负担一般轻于欧盟。出货前请向在地进口商确认现行 AZSTAND 合格评定范围、接受的报告格式、标志及语言。
gap.zht: AZSTAND 合格評定流程與 CCC 並行運作，不存在互認——產品須為各市場分別準備合格評定文件。相對中國基線的亞塞拜然特有要點：（1）市場准入通常經由在地進口商辦理（不同於歐盟授權代表的模式，但具相似的在地問責職能），清關經巴庫港；（2）AZSTAND 合格標誌（如有規定）及亞塞拜然語/俄語消費者信息替代 CCC 標誌/中國包裝；（3）亞塞拜然非 EAEU 成員，故無須 EAC 標誌（勿將亞塞拜然與 EAEU 市場混淆）；（4）IEC/CB 方案檢測報告常可轉用於 AZSTAND 合格評定，相比全部重做可減少重新檢測——但接受度須確認；（5）相比歐盟通道，無確認的 RoHS 鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測、無 EPREL 注冊、無 REACH SVHC 義務，故亞塞拜然文件負擔一般輕於歐盟。出貨前請向在地進口商確認現行 AZSTAND 合格評定範圍、接受的報告格式、標誌及語言。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — AZSTAND conformity and technical documentation required before placing regulated luminaires on the Azerbaijan market; in-country importer typically required; no EAEU EAC marking (non-EAEU)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Placing LED luminaires on the Azerbaijan market requires AZSTAND conformity against adopted AZS/IEC standards, a technical file, and — typically — an in-country importer who handles documentation and Baku-port clearance. AZSTAND and CCC are parallel non-mutual processes. Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member, so no EAC marking applies. IEC/CB reports can often be leveraged to reduce re-testing — confirm acceptance. Compared with the EU lane, there is no RoHS phthalate testing, no EPREL registration, and no REACH SVHC duty, so the documentation burden is generally lighter. Confirm current scope, accepted report formats, marking, and language with the in-country importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿塞拜疆市场销售 LED 灯具须就所采用 AZS/IEC 标准取得 AZSTAND 合格评定、备齐技术文件，并通常须有处理文件及巴库港清关的在地进口商。AZSTAND 与 CCC 为并行的非互认流程。阿塞拜疆非 EAEU 成员，故 EAC 标志不适用。IEC/CB 报告常可转用以减少重新检测——请确认接受度。相比欧盟通道，无 RoHS 邻苯二甲酸酯检测、无 EPREL 注册、无 REACH SVHC 义务，故文件负担一般更轻。出货前请向在地进口商确认现行范围、接受的报告格式、标志及语言。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在亞塞拜然市場銷售 LED 燈具須就所採用 AZS/IEC 標準取得 AZSTAND 合格評定、備齊技術文件，並通常須有處理文件及巴庫港清關的在地進口商。AZSTAND 與 CCC 為並行的非互認流程。亞塞拜然非 EAEU 成員，故 EAC 標誌不適用。IEC/CB 報告常可轉用以減少重新檢測——請確認接受度。相比歐盟通道，無 RoHS 鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測、無 EPREL 注冊、無 REACH SVHC 義務，故文件負擔一般更輕。出貨前請向在地進口商確認現行範圍、接受的報告格式、標誌及語言。
